# Greenance

> AI-powered nature risk intelligence platform (water, soil, biodiversity) at the asset level, primarly for banks, but also asset managers, insurers, and any financial institutions.

Greenance automatically identifies and geolocates a company's assets from its name alone, processing over a hundred assets in under a minute. Each site is cross-referenced against global environmental databases (WRI Aqueduct, SoilGrids, Natura 2000, IBAT, Natura 2000, KBA, Copernicus, USGS, GRESB, Open-Meteo) to produce a nature vulnerability score, tailored to the activity, across three pillars: water, soil, biodiversity.

The methodology is built on the TNFD/LEAP and ENCORE frameworks, and aligns with CSRD and ECB/SSM supervisory expectations on physical risk (2026), as well as EBA/GL/2025/01.

Built first for commercial banks (credit analysts, ESG teams, risk and compliance directors), Greenance also serves asset managers, insurers, SCPI/OPCI managers, and development banks.

## Contact
